extension.description: Native Subversion client for VS Code.
workspaceTrust.description: SubversionR supports Restricted Mode for local read-only SVN status, BASE content, and loaded history through its packaged backend. Trust the workspace to enable SVN write operations, remote update and commit actions, external tool integrations, and custom SVN config or tunnel commands.

view.history.name: SVN History
view.scm.emptyState.content:
No SVN working copy was found in the workspace.
[Open SVN Working Copy…](command:subversionr.openRepository)
[Checkout SVN Repository…](command:subversionr.checkoutRepository)
walkthrough.betaWorkflow.title: Get started with SubversionR
walkthrough.betaWorkflow.description: Open an SVN working copy, review status, commit changes, and inspect SVN history from VS Code.
Open or checkout a working copy

Start from an existing SVN working copy or checkout a repository URL.
[Open SVN Working Copy…](command:subversionr.openRepository)
[Checkout SVN Repository…](command:subversionr.checkoutRepository)
walkthrough.betaWorkflow.reviewStatus.de:
Use Source Control to inspect local SVN changes, then refresh status or check remote changes on demand.
[Refresh SVN Status](command:subversionr.refreshRepository)
[Check Remote Changes](command:subversionr.checkRemoteChanges)
walkthrough.betaWorkflow.reviewAndCommit:
Review selected SVN paths before committing so changelists, unversioned items, conflicts, and commit message history stay visible.
[Review and Commit](command:subversionr.reviewCommit)
Open repository history and properties when you need context before update, switch, or commit.
[Show Repository Log](command:subversionr.showRepositoryLog)
[Show Repository Properties](command:subversionr.showRepositoryProperties)
SubversionR history and metadata workflow diagram
configuration.title: SubversionR
configuration.tortoise.executablePath.de: Absolute path to TortoiseProc.exe for optional TortoiseSVN integration. Workspace values are ignored in Restricted Mode.
configuration.tortoise.configDirectory.d: Absolute path to the TortoiseSVN configuration directory for optional TortoiseSVN integration. Workspace values are ignored in Restricted Mode.
configuration.remote.profiles.descriptio: Machine-scoped, non-secret remote access profiles. Every profile is validated against the versioned schema before use; workspace and folder values are not accepted.
configuration.status.countUnversioned.de: Include unversioned SVN resources in the Source Control badge count.
configuration.status.ignoreChangelistsIn: SVN changelist names excluded from the Source Control badge count.
configuration.history.pageSize.descripti: Maximum number of SVN log revisions to request for each foreground history page.
configuration.history.includeMergedRevis: Include merged revisions in explicit SVN history requests.
configuration.lens.enabled.description: Enable SubversionR SVN Lens editor features.
configuration.lens.fileHeader.descriptio: Show SubversionR file header CodeLens entries for projected local SVN files.
configuration.lens.currentLine.descripti: Show SubversionR current-line blame context when supported.
configuration.lens.hover.description: Show SubversionR revision hover context when supported.
configuration.lens.symbols.description: Show optional SubversionR symbol history CodeLens entries when supported.
configuration.lens.maxFileLines.descript: Maximum text document line count for automatic SubversionR SVN Lens features.
